channel.title: +Articles on कल्पान्तरे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on कल्पान्तरे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: gaNesha on hindu-view
item.description: Source: TW The Hindu View on Food and Drink Shatavadhani Ganesh Co-authored by Hari Ravikumar with additional inputs from Dr. G. L. Krishna and Dr. Koti Sreekrishna In 2007, the Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations conducted a survey of meat consumption per person in every country. India came last. Further, there are more vegetarians in India than the rest of the world combined (we can get a sense from this list).

item.title: Liquor
item.description: trantravArttika - TW1, TW2 opines that only brAhmaNas are completely prohibited from alcohol, shUdras have no prohibitions at all & that kSatriyas are allowed to drink the alcohol named madhu (fruit wine) and are only prohibited from surA (liquor from rice and other grains such as barley).

item.title: palāṇḍu laśuna gṛñjana
item.description: Haradatta on Āpastamba DS 1.5.17.26 takes palāṇḍu as a type of laśuna. Śūlapāṇi on Yājñavalkyasmṛti 1.176 calls laśuna as a type of palāṇḍu. Though Amarasiṃha calls gṛñjana as laśuna, Viśvarūpa on YS 1.176 calls gṛñjana as similar to palāṇḍu, known in Udīcyadeśa. (अमरे तु सजातीकानि नामानि गुम्फितानि। न तानि सदा समानार्थानि। ) लशुनपलाण्डुलक्षणानि भावप्रकाशनिघण्टौ द्वितीये हरीतक्यादिवर्गे। तथा च तस्मिन् निघण्टौ रोगभैषज्यादिषु अधिकारेषु पश्यत एतादृशं - निष्कुष्य लशुनं सम्यक् संक्षुद्य तिलतैलवत्।
